goal: 修复 PR 89 golangci-lint gocritic 报错

summary.title: Satisfy golangci-lint gocritic unlambda in hub templates
summary.what: Replaced the Hub template FuncMap join wrapper with strings.Join directly, satisfying gocritic unlambda without changing template behavior. The branch also retains the earlier context --files multi-path CLI fix already proposed in int_fb537187.
summary.why: GitHub CI runs golangci-lint v1.62.2 with gocritic enabled, while the earlier local verification did not run that exact linter. The wrapper function was behaviorally identical to strings.Join and should not block CI.
summary.user_goal: 修复 PR 89 的 golangci-lint gocritic 报错，并解释本地验证与 GitHub CI 的差异

decisions.chose: Use strings.Join directly in the template FuncMap.
decisions.rationale: It is the exact function the lambda delegated to, so this is the smallest behavior-preserving lint fix.

decisions.chose: Run golangci-lint v1.62.2 via go run, matching the CI version.
decisions.rationale: make quick-test and go build do not exercise gocritic; CI does.

rejected.alternative: Disable or suppress the gocritic unlambda warning
rejected.reason: The suggested replacement is simpler and behavior-preserving, so suppression would add unnecessary lint debt.

risks: The follow-up intent was started on the existing PR branch, so seal prepare reports the full branch diff against main, including the earlier context CLI files. The only new follow-up code change is internal/hub/render.go.
Template FuncMap accepts any function value with a compatible signature; strings.Join has the same signature as the removed wrapper.

anti_patterns.what: Treating make quick-test or go build as equivalent to CI lint
anti_patterns.why: The repository CI runs golangci-lint with gocritic, which can fail on code that compiles and passes tests.

behavioral_changes: Hub template join helper remains available and delegates directly to strings.Join
PR branch now satisfies golangci-lint gocritic unlambda check
